item.title: Jaime French on Season 4 of 1000-LB
item.description: Jaime French shares thoughts on Season 4 of 1000-LB and why it feels relatable to watch.

item.title: Jaime French on Boomer Humor

item.title: Jaime French on the “Locked In” Guy
